title: dysoxylum multijugum
intro: Dysoxylum multijugum, also known as the Chinese quassia, is a plant species in the family Meliaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dysoxylum multijugum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Dysoxylum multijugum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
